tr: Dün karşılaştığım öğretmen senin hakkında güzel şeyler söyledi.
en: The teacher that I met yesterday told nice things about you.
Today is the day that the music died.

tr: O fakir insanlara yardım etmek için arabasını satan adam.
en: He is the man that sold his car to help the poor.

tr: Burası annemle babamın tanışmış olduğu yerdir.
en: This is the place that my mom and dad had met.

tr: Geçen hafta bana verdiğin kitabı okuyamadım.
en: I couldn't read the book that you gave me last week.

tr: Dün otobüste gördüğüm adam çok kabaydı.
en: The man that I saw on the bus yesterday was very rude.
The people that I met today were very fun.

tr: Evin bahçesinde oynayan kedileri gördün mü?
en: Did you see the cats that are playing in the garden of the house?
The fish that we saw in the sea were very big.

tr: Geçen hafta satın aldığım telefonu kaybettim.
en: I lost the phone that I bought last week.

tr: Hastaneye gelen hastalar doktorlarla konuşmak istiyorlar.
en: The patients that came to the hospital want to talk to the doctors.

tr: Beraber çalıştığım insanlar hakkında konuşmak istemiyorum.
en: I don't want to talk about the people that I work with.
The ice cream that we ate on holiday was very delicious.
The people that we saw on TV are lying.
Half of the doctors that work in our hospital are inexperienced.

tr: Bankaya gelen müşterilerin çoğu 20 dakika bekliyor.
en: Most of the customers that came to the bank wait for 20 minutes.

tr: Bu yaz gideceğim yerleri Ali’ye anlattım.
en: I told Ali the places that I will go this summer.

tr: Annemin sattığı araba yüzünden işe otobüsle gitmek zorundayım.
en: I have to go to work by bus because of the car that my mother sold.

tr: Oğlumun satın aldığı yeni bilgisayar için çok para ödedim.
en: I paid a lot of money for the computer that my son bought.
The games that we played when we were children were very fun.
I didn't receive the emails that you sent yesterday.
The questions that we tried to solve were very hard.

tr: Biz onların ziyaret etmek istedikleri yerleri görmedik.
en: We didn't see the places that they want to visit.

tr: Çocuklarımın bilmesini istediğim şeyler hakkında konuşmak istiyorum.
en: I want to talk about the things that I want my children to know.

tr: Çocuklarımın bilmesini istemediğim şeyler hakkında konuşmak istemiyorum.
en: I don't want to talk about the things that I don't want my children to know.
The food that we ate yesterday was very spicy.

tr: Gelecek yıl satın alacağım araba çok pahalı.
en: The car that I will buy next year is very expensive.

tr: Gelecek yıl satın almak istediğim araba çok ucuz.
en: The car that I want to buy next year is very cheap.
The house that I wanted my father to sell was in Ankara.
There are things that I want to know.
There are things that I want you to know.

tr: Gitmek istediğin yerler hakkında konuşmak ister misin?
en: Do you want to talk about the places that you want to go to?
There are places that I don't want them to go to.
There were things that I wanted you to see.
There will be places that they want us to visit.

tr: Annemin satın almamı istediği elbise çok kötüydü.
en: The dress that my mother wanted me to buy was very bad.

tr: Öğrencilerimin öğrenmesini istediğim konular çok önemlidir.
en: The subjects that I want my students to learn are very important.

tr: Sizlerin çözmek zorunda olduğunuz sorunlar var.
en: There are problems that you have to solve.

tr: Cevap vermek istemediğim sorular hakkında konuşmak istemiyorum.
en: I don't want to talk about the questions that I don't want to answer.

tr: Öğrenmeye çalıştığım şeyler çok zor değil.
en: The things that I am trying to learn aren't very hard.
The things that I will learn are very simple.
The things that I learned were very bad.

tr: Öğrenmek zorunda olduğum şeyleri bana söylemeni istiyorum.
en: I want you to tell me the things that I have to learn.
You hear the words that you want to hear.

tr: Anlamanı istediğim konuları bilmek ister misin?
en: Do you want to know the subjects that I want you to understand?
The movie that we watched yesterday was very boring.
The teacher that I spoke with in the morning was very helpful.
The shoes that I bought yesterday were very comfortable.

tr: Geçen ay gittiğimiz şehir çok güzeldi.
en: The city that we went to last month was very beautiful.
I have just seen the message that you sent to me.
The topics that we learned at school were very hard.
I bought the book that you suggested to me.

tr: Sabah gördüğüm haber beni çok üzdü.
en: The news that I saw in the morning made me very sad.
The subject that we talked about yesterday was very important.

tr: Bana yardım eden adam çok nazikti.
en: The man that helped me was very kind.
The number that I called yesterday was busy.

tr: Geçen yıl tanıştığım insanlarla hâlâ arkadaşım.
en: I am still friends with the people that I met last year.

tr: Dün satın aldığımız ev çok eskiydi.
en: The house that we bought yesterday was very old.
The information that you gave me was very useful.
The song that I listened to yesterday was very nice.

tr: Bu sabah yaptığım hata yüzünden geç kaldım.
en: I was late because of the mistake that I made this morning.
Everything that they told me was true.

tr: Bana anlattıkları hiçbir şey doğru değildi.
en: Nothing that they told me was true.

tr: İngilizce hakkında öğrenmek istediğin her şey bu sitede.
en: Everything that you want to learn about English is on this website.
Everybody that I saw on the bus was unhappy.

tr: Tatilde gittiğim her yerde ilginç şeyler yedim.
en: I ate interesting things everywhere that I went on holiday.
The plan that we made yesterday was cancelled.
The question that you asked me was very hard.

tr: Bana söyleyeceğin hiçbir şeyi duymak istemiyorum.
en: I don't want to hear anything that you will tell me.
The teacher that I met yesterday was from England.

tr: Bana verdiğin tavsiye çok işe yaradı.
en: The advice that you gave me worked a lot.
The dream that I had yesterday was very strange.

tr: Dün hastanede tanıştığım adam çok iyi bir doktordu.
en: The man that I met at the hospital yesterday was a very good doctor.
We liked the pizza that we ate in the restaurant at noon.

tr: Geçen hafta sinemada izlediğimiz film hakkında konuşmak istiyorum.
en: I want to talk about the movie that we watched at the cinema last week.

tr: Geçen hafta tatilde tanıştığımız aile çılgındı.
en: The family that we met on holiday last week was crazy.

tr: İstanbul'da yediğim en iyi yemek Tarabya'daydı.
en: The best food that I ate in Istanbul was in Tarabya.

tr: Geçen hafta otobüste gördüğün kız ünlü bir oyuncuydu.
en: The girl that you saw on the bus last week was a famous actress.

tr: Geçen yıl karımla birlikte tatile gittiğimiz yeri sevdik.
en: We liked the place that we went to on holiday with my wife last year.

tr: On yıl önce onlarla beraber çalıştığım şirketi özlüyorum.
en: I miss the company that I worked with them ten years ago.

tr: Arkadaşımla bu yaz tatilde okuduğum kitap hakkında konuşuyoruz.
en: We are talking with my friend about the book that I read on holiday this summer.

tr: Bugün dün beni telefonla arayan adamla tanıştım.
en: Today I met the man that called me on the phone yesterday.

tr: İtalya'da yediğim yemekleri Türkiye’de de yemek istiyorum.
en: I want to eat the food that I ate in Italy in Turkey too.

tr: Dün toplantıda tanıştığım mühendis benimle çalışmak istediğini söyledi.
en: The engineer that I met at the meeting yesterday said that he wanted to work with me.

tr: Dün toplantıda benimle konuşan müdürüm sessiz olmamı söyledi.
en: My manager that spoke with me at the meeting yesterday told me to be quiet.

tr: Amerika'da gördüğümüz yerlerin fotoğrafını seninle paylaşmamı ister misin?
en: Do you want me to share the photos of the places that we saw in America with you?

tr: Dün patronuma söylediğim şeyler yüzünden bugün işsizim.
en: I am unemployed today because of the things that I told my boss yesterday.

tr: Annemin dün pazarda gördüğü kadın bugün evimize geldi.
en: The woman that my mother saw at the market yesterday came to our house today.
